components.name: jobs(deploy-backend).steps[5](Build, tag, and push Docker image)

vulnerabilities.description: Resource: on(Deploy tavus-pipecat-example). Ensure top-level permissions are not set to write-all
Resource: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener.ALBListener. Ensure that Load Balancer Listener is using at least TLS v1.2
Resource: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer.ALB. Ensure that ALB drops HTTP headers
Resource: AWS::ECR::Repository.ECRRepository. Ensure that ECR repositories are encrypted using KMS
Resource: AWS::Logs::LogGroup.LogGroup. Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group is encrypted by KMS
Resource: AWS::CloudFront::Distribution.CloudFrontDistribution. Verify CloudFront Distribution Viewer Certificate is using TLS v1.2 or higher
Resource: AWS::S3::Bucket.FrontendBucket. Ensure the S3 bucket has access logging enabled
Resource: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener.ALBListener. Ensure ALB protocol is HTTPS
Resource: AWS::S3::Bucket.FrontendBucket. Ensure the S3 bucket has versioning enabled
Resource: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup.ALBSecurityGroup. Ensure every security groups rule has a description
Resource: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup.ECSSecurityGroup. Ensure every security groups rule has a description
Resource: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup.ALBSecurityGroup. Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 80
Resource: AWS::ECR::Repository.ECRRepository. Ensure ECR Image Tags are immutable
Resource: AWS::S3::Bucket.FrontendBucket. Ensure S3 bucket has block public ACLs enabled
Resource: AWS::S3::Bucket.FrontendBucket. Ensure S3 bucket has block public policy enabled
Resource: AWS::S3::Bucket.FrontendBucket. Ensure S3 bucket has ignore public ACLs enabled
Resource: AWS::S3::Bucket.FrontendBucket. Ensure S3 bucket has RestrictPublicBuckets enabled
Resource: AWS::ECS::Cluster.ECSCluster. Ensure container insights are enabled on ECS cluster
Resource: AWS::CloudFront::Distribution.CloudFrontDistribution. CloudFront Distribution should have WAF enabled
Resource: AWS::CloudFront::Distribution.CloudFrontDistribution. Ensure CloudFront Distribution has Access Logging enabled
Resource: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer.ALB. Ensure the ELBv2 (Application/Network) has access logging enabled
Resource: /tavus-pipecat-example/Dockerfile.. Ensure that HEALTHCHECK instructions have been added to container images
Resource: /tavus-pipecat-example/Dockerfile.. Ensure that a user for the container has been created
